name: Great Eastern Financier Whole Life w/ CB — multi-rider extraction
description:
From the Soh family xlsx: this Whole Life has multiple riders mashed into the Coverage cell with newlines. AI must extract them as a structured riders array, not as one blob string. The Coverage cell looked like: 'Death $170k SA
Extended TPD Rider $50k (10 Feb 2028)
TPD $220k SA
Living Assurance Rider $30k (10 Feb 2028)
CI $30k SA (until 2028)
Term Rider w/ TPD Benefits $40k (10 Feb 2033)'.
rawAiOutput: { "insurer": "Great Eastern", "productName": "Financier Whole Life with CB", "policyNumber": "0012554905", "category": "protection", "subType": "Whole Life", "currency": "SGD", "sumAssured": 170000, "inceptionDate": "1991-02-11", "riders": [ {"type":"death","riderName":"Death","sa":170000,"bundled":true}, {"type":"tpd","riderName":"Extended TPD Rider","sa":50000,"expiryAge":null,"expiryDate":"2028-02-10","bundled":false}, {"type":"tpd","riderName":"TPD","sa":220000,"bundled":true}, {"type":"ci","riderName":"Living Assurance Rider","sa":30000,"expiryDate":"2028-02-10","bundled":false}, {"type":"ci","riderName":"Critical Illness","sa":30000,"expiryDate":"2028-12-31","bundled":true}, {"type":"other","riderName":"Term Rider w/ TPD Benefits","sa":40000,"expiryDate":"2033-02-10","bundled":false} ] }
